mapper.insert: INSERT INTO edu_course_selection (student_id, teaching_assignment_id, select_time, status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{teachingAssignmentId}, NOW(), 1)
mapper.select: SELECT ta.max_students as maxStudents, ta.semester as semester, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM edu_course_selection WHERE teaching_assignment_id = ta.id) as selectedCount FROM edu_teaching_assignment ta WHERE ta.id = #{teachingAssignmentId}
